design_philosophy: Utilitarian, distraction-free, hyper-functional. Color is used strictly as a functional indicator (e.g., green for success), not for decoration. Massive whitespace and stark contrast.

layout_and_spacing.global: Mobile-first responsive. Flex or Grid layouts. No jagged bottoms.
layout_and_spacing.sidebar: Fixed left, w-64, pure white, right border (border-gray-200). Generous internal padding (p-6).
layout_and_spacing.main_content: ml-64 (desktop), generous padding (p-8 to p-12). Maximum width limits on reading containers.
layout_and_spacing.dashboard_grid: The 'Control Room' Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6.
layout_and_spacing.surfaces: Flat UI. No shadows (or very faint ambient shadow). 1px solid borders for definition. Corner radius: rounded-md max.

components.navigation: Left sidebar with clear active states (bg-gray-100 text-gray-900).
components.cards: border border-gray-200 bg-white p-6 rounded-md. Strict padding.
components.buttons: Primary: bg-gray-900 text-white hover:bg-gray-800. Secondary: bg-white border border-gray-200 text-gray-900 hover:bg-gray-50.
components.inputs: Shadcn UI standard, border-gray-200, focus:ring-gray-900 focus:border-gray-900.

life_in_weeks.description: Grid visualizing entire lifespan in weeks.
life_in_weeks.layout: Dense grid mapping ~80 years (52 cols x 80 rows).
life_in_weeks.styling: w-2 h-2 or w-3 h-3 squares. gap-1 or gap-[2px].
life_in_weeks.colors: Lived weeks: bg-gray-800. Unlived weeks: bg-gray-100. Current week: animate-pulse bg-gray-400.

daily_log_calendar.description: Traditional boxes in a calendar view for daily reflection.
daily_log_calendar.logic: Color is NOT fully green unless tasks are set before 9AM and all completed.
daily_log_calendar.colors: Success (Green): bg-emerald-600. Partial/Fail: bg-gray-200 or border only.

habit_and_workout_logger.description: Daily checklist for tasks and workouts.
habit_and_workout_logger.ui: Clean, border-bottom separated list items. Custom large hit-area checkboxes.

daily_reflection.description: Text areas for 'What I did right' and 'What I did wrong'.
daily_reflection.ui: Minimalist textareas with auto-resize, sans-serif or mono typography.

financial_tracker.description: Net worth, savings accounts, APY, income, expenses.
financial_tracker.typography: MUST use JetBrains Mono for all numeric values.
financial_tracker.default_state: Start at 0 for all stats initially.
financial_tracker.charts: Recharts line/area chart. Monochrome lines (black/gray) with subtle fills.

auth_and_roles.logic: Owner can edit inputs, add tasks, modify finances. Viewers see a read-only, seamless dashboard without edit buttons or disabled states.

testing_and_accessibility.data_testids: MANDATORY. Every interactive element, form, and major visual block must have a data-testid (e.g., data-testid='life-in-weeks-grid', data-testid='financial-stat-networth').
testing_and_accessibility.contrast: All text must pass WCAG AA. Gray-400 or lighter should not be used for essential text.
testing_and_accessibility.focus_states: Visible focus rings (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-gray-900 focus:ring-offset-2) on all interactive elements.

icons_and_assets.style: Stroke width 1.5, standard sizing (w-5 h-5 for nav, w-4 h-4 for inline).
